## What changed

<!-- One or two lines. What does this PR do. -->

## Why

<!-- The reason. What problem does it solve, or what does it make better. -->

## How it was tested

<!-- The commands you ran, and what you saw. Not "it works". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The title follows Conventional Commits 1.0.0 (for example `fix:`, `feat:`, `docs:`).
- [ ] The build is clean with warnings as errors (`-Werror`, the project warning set).
- [ ] Tests cover the change, and the full suite passes (`ctest`).
- [ ] The sanitizer runs pass (address, undefined, and thread).
- [ ] The docs match the code (README, deep dive, and the config key tables).
- [ ] No new dependency beyond libc, pthread, and POSIX.
